textPlain: Since you asked about alternate packing solutions:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=43305920I don't know enough about the subject to have any useful suggestions, but I'd be interested in your take on how a project like yours would work differently if you were to choose a different solution.

Related, there’s a Reddit post tracking the furthest photos of the Sydney skyline:https://www.reddit.com/r/sydney/comments/1lzke5t/the_actual_...Google Earth map: https://earth.google.com/web/@-32.84964163,149.89452785,590....
If you consider atmospheric refraction it might be more complicated...
